user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: Company Name
columns.description: Official name of the AI company or organization

columns.name: Website
columns.description: Official company website URL where company information and careers page can be accessed

columns.name: Is Hiring for AI Roles?
columns.description: Confirmed status of whether the company is actively recruiting for AI-related positions (research, engineering, product, etc.). Should reflect current hiring status based on careers page or recent job postings.
columns.validation_strategy: Check company careers page for open AI positions. Search for recent job postings on LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, and company-specific careers portal. Verify postings are from the last 30 days. Look for roles with titles containing: AI, Machine Learning, ML, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Data Science, AI Research, AI Engineer.

columns.name: Team Size (Approximate)
columns.description: Estimated total number of employees at the company. Provide range if exact number unavailable (e.g., '50-100', '1000+').
columns.validation_strategy: Check company LinkedIn profile for employee count. Cross-reference with Crunchbase, company About page, or recent news articles. If range is provided, use the most recent data available. Note data source if estimate is approximate.

columns.name: Recent Funding (Last Round)
columns.description: Most recent funding round information including round type (Seed, Series A/B/C, etc.), amount raised, date of funding, and lead investors if available. Format as: '[Round Type] - $[Amount] - [Date] - Led by [Investor(s)]' or 'No recent funding' if private/bootstrapped.
columns.validation_strategy: Search Crunchbase, PitchBook, or company press releases for most recent funding announcement. Verify funding date is within last 24 months. Include round type, amount, and lead investor. For bootstrapped or private companies, note 'Bootstrapped' or 'Private' accordingly. Cross-reference multiple sources to confirm accuracy.

columns.name: AI Sector Focus
columns.description: Primary sector or domain where the company applies AI technology. Examples: AI Research, Healthcare AI, Enterprise AI, Computer Vision, NLP, Autonomous Systems, Robotics, etc.
columns.validation_strategy: Review company mission statement, product descriptions, and job postings to identify primary AI application area. Check company About page and recent press releases. Categorize into one primary sector based on majority of company focus and hiring activity.

columns.name: Company Stage
columns.description: Development stage of the company: Startup (pre-Series A or early stage), Growth Stage (Series A-C), Established (Series D+), or Public Company.
columns.validation_strategy: Determine based on funding history and company age. Startups: founded within last 5 years or pre-Series A. Growth Stage: Series A-C funding. Established: Series D+ or 10+ years old. Public: traded on stock exchange. Cross-reference Crunchbase founding date with funding rounds.

search_strategy.description: Identify AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established organizations and startups with demonstrated growth and investment in AI talent

subdomains.name: AI Research & Foundation Model Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies focused on fundamental AI research, large language models, foundation models, and cutting-edge AI development. Includes both independent research labs and companies building core AI technology.
search_queries: AI research companies hiring 2025 OpenAI Anthropic DeepMind
foundation model companies actively hiring machine learning researchers
large language model LLM companies recruiting AI engineers
AI research labs hiring positions careers

subdomains.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies applying AI to healthcare, drug discovery, medical imaging, clinical diagnostics, and life sciences research. Includes biotech AI, medical device AI, and healthcare software companies.
search_queries: healthcare AI companies hiring 2025 medical imaging drug discovery
biotech AI startups recruiting machine learning engineers
clinical AI platforms hiring data scientists positions
medical AI companies careers open positions

subdomains.name: Enterprise & Business AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies developing AI solutions for enterprise customers, business intelligence, automation, and productivity. Includes AI platforms, SaaS companies with AI features, and enterprise software vendors.
search_queries: enterprise AI companies hiring 2025 business automation
AI software companies recruiting engineers product managers
B2B AI platforms actively hiring careers
enterprise automation AI startups hiring

subdomains.name: Computer Vision & Robotics AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies specializing in computer vision, autonomous systems, robotics, and perception AI. Includes autonomous vehicle companies, robotics startups, and vision-based AI platforms.
search_queries: computer vision companies hiring 2025 autonomous vehicles robotics
robotics AI startups recruiting engineers
autonomous systems companies careers open positions
vision AI platforms hiring machine learning

subdomains.name: Other AI & Emerging Sector Companies
subdomains.focus: AI companies in emerging sectors not covered above, including NLP applications, recommendation systems, fintech AI, and other specialized AI domains. Catch-all category for diverse AI applications.
search_queries: NLP companies hiring 2025 natural language processing
fintech AI companies recruiting machine learning engineers
AI startups hiring various sectors not in research healthcare enterprise
emerging AI companies careers open positions

search_strategy.user_context:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.
search_strategy.table_purpose: Identify AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established organizations and startups with demonstrated growth and investment in AI talent

final_rows.match_rationale: OpenAI is a leading AI research lab focused on developing large language models and foundation models, with ongoing hiring for research and engineering roles.
Anthropic is a prominent AI safety research company specializing in large language models and actively recruiting for AI research and engineering positions.
DeepMind, now merged with Google Brain, is a world-renowned AI research lab focused on fundamental AI, reinforcement learning, and foundation models, with ongoing recruitment for research roles.

Legion is a next-gen enterprise AI infrastructure startup that emerged from stealth in August 2025 with $38M in funding, specifically targeting business automation, data transformation, and secure AI deployment for enterprises—directly matching the subdomain focus.
Manas AI is a new startup focused on AI-driven drug discovery, specifically targeting cancers, launched in January 2025 with significant funding and clear healthcare/life sciences focus.

Qraft Technologies is a fintech AI company specializing in AI-powered asset management and algorithmic trading, actively hiring for machine learning and AI roles, and recently secured $146 million in funding from SoftBank in January 2025.
Microsoft Research AI is a major player in foundational AI research, with active hiring for roles in machine learning, large language models, and AI systems.

Rifa AI is an emerging NLP company focused on conversational voice AI for enterprise support, raised $1.1 million in seed funding in August 2025, and is actively hiring for AI and engineering roles as it scales its platform.
Dataiku is a leading enterprise AI platform provider, known for enabling business intelligence and automation at scale, and is actively hiring for AI roles as part of the 2025 AI talent surge.
Silna Health is an AI healthcare company that raised $27 million in 2025, indicating active growth and investment in AI for healthcare applications.
